seoTitle: Mackay vs Mackay Harbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mackay and Mackay Harbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mackay vs Mackay Harbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mackay and Mackay Harbour.
heading: Mackay vs Mackay Harbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mackay, Queensland and Mackay Harbour, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mackay Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Mackay (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mackay or Mackay Harbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mackay has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Mackay Harbour scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mackay scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Mackay Harbour scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mackay or Mackay Harbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mackay Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
